case_title: KHIN KHIN OHN VS. SPECIALTY RETAIL VENTURES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OHN, KHIN KHIN AS TO DEFENDANT SPECIALTY RETAIL VENTURES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SAN FRANCISCO MUSIC BOX; DBA CALENDAR CLUB JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OHN, KHIN KHIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPECIALTY RETAIL VENTURES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SAN FRANCISCO MUSIC BOX; DBA CALENDAR CLUB $2,795.12 PRINCIPAL, $1.89 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,953.31, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
